cards.name: 9 of Cups
cards.interpretation: wishes coming true, contentment, satisfaction, success, achievements, recognition, pleasure

cards.name: ⅩⅢ Death, reversed
cards.interpretation: fear of change, repeating negative patterns, resisting change, stagnancy, decay

cards.name: ⅩⅡ The Hanged Man
cards.interpretation: sacrifice, waiting, uncertainty, lack of direction, perspective, contemplation
